violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 1-door low boy under espresso machine and the kitchen 1-door reach-in. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2025

Painter's tape is used in the repair of the 1-door reach-in door handle in the kitchen area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to have employee take food safety manager course. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024

Prepared sandwiches were observed held at 62-65 degrees Fahrenheit on the front counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Sandwiches had been prepared less than 4 hours prior to inspection and were placed in freezer to rapidly cool. Establishment to cease practice of leaving sandwiches on counter for display and sale to consumers. Sandwiches are to be held under refrigeration or made at consumer's request. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
The door to the cafe toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet room doors that open to food preparation areas shall be self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2023
